case_title: OPORTUN INC VS. STEVE PINEDA RELIGIOSIO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RELIGIOSIO, STEVE PINEDA $1,578.61 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,693.61, LOAN PRINCIPAL 1300, ACCRUED INTEREST ADJUSTED TO 152.61, LATE FEES 126; NO PAYMENTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
FEE FOR OVER 12 CLAIMS/YEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.00 - SERVED NOV-22-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RELIGIOSIO, STEVE PINEDA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2018 BY PRO TEM CARL CHAMBERLIN. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SETVE PINEDA RELIGIOSIO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
